allow: Bash(psql "postgresql://postgres:post1234@localhost:5432/heroclash_dsw" -c "SELECT ic.id, ic.created_at, c.name as carta_name, cc.name as carta_class FROM item_carta ic JOIN carta c ON ic.carta_id = c.id LEFT JOIN carta_class cc ON ic.carta_class_id = cc.id ORDER BY ic.created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
